payload.title: Proposed Finance Committee Work Plan
payload.description: Proposed 2026 Finance Committee Work Plan listing recurring and specific agenda items by month from January to December.

tool_args.label: MTA Office of Management & Budget
tool_args.raw_text: Responsibility: MTA OMB/Finance, MTA Office of Management & Budget, MTA OMB

payload.description: MTA Office of Management & Budget, responsible for Financial Plan, Budget, and related reports presented to the Finance Committee.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTA Office of Management & Budget will present, for information purposes, a revised Financial Plan

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

payload.title: Proposed Finance Committee Work Plan
payload.description: Proposed 2026 Finance Committee Work Plan listing recurring and specific agenda items by month from January to December, each with assigned responsible MTA office.
Responsible for MTA Financial Plan, Adopted Budget revisions, Preliminary Budget, Final Proposed Budget, and four-year Financial Plan presentations to the Finance Committee.

tool_args.label: Transit Adjudication Bureau (TAB)
tool_args.raw_text: Transit Adjudication Bureau Report to the Committee on Transit Adjudication Bureau financial and operating indicators including collection activities and data on revenue and expenses.

payload.description: Reports to Finance Committee on financial and operating indicators including collection activities and data on revenue and expenses.

tool_args.label: Preliminary Budget/July Financial Plan
tool_args.raw_text: Preliminary Budget/July Financial Plan - The Chief Financial Officer and MTA Office of Management & Budget will present an updated forecast for the current year, a Preliminary Budget for the next year, and a four-year Financial Plan.

payload.description: Preliminary Budget/July Financial Plan - The Chief Financial Officer and MTA Office of Management & Budget will present an updated forecast for the current year, a Preliminary Budget for the next year, and a four-year Financial Plan.

tool_args.label: Final Proposed Budget/November Financial Plan
tool_args.raw_text: Final Proposed Budget/November Financial Plan - The MTA Chief Financial Officer and MTA Office of Management & Budget will present an updated forecast for the current year, a Final Proposed Budget for next year, and a four-year Financial Plan.

payload.description: Final Proposed Budget/November Financial Plan - The MTA Chief Financial Officer and MTA Office of Management & Budget will present an updated forecast for the current year, a Final Proposed Budget for next year, and a four-year Financial Plan.

tool_args.label: December Finance Committee - Adoption of Final Budget and Approval of Proposed Work Plan
tool_args.raw_text: December - Action Items: Adoption of Final Budget and Financial Plan, Authorization to Issue MTA and TBTA New Money Bonds, Approval of Proposed Work Plan

payload.description: December Action Items: Adoption of Final Budget and Financial Plan (Committee recommends action to the Board), Authorization to Issue MTA and TBTA New Money Bonds and related obligations, and Approval of Proposed Work Plan.

tool_args.label: February - TBTA Operating Surplus
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA Operating Surplus - The MTA Comptroller should be prepared to answer questions on a staff summary requesting (1) transfer of TBTA Operating Surplus and Investment Income, (2) advances of TBTA Operating Surplus, and (3) the deduction from TBTA Operating Revenue, funds which shall be paid into the Necessary Reconstruction Reserve.

payload.description: February Action Item: TBTA Operating Surplus - The MTA Comptroller should be prepared to answer questions on a staff summary requesting (1) transfer of TBTA Operating Surplus and Investment Income, (2) advances of TBTA Operating Surplus, and (3) the deduction from TBTA Operating Revenue for the Necessary Reconstruction Reserve.

tool_args.label: May - Annual Meeting of the First Mutual Transportation Assurance Company
tool_args.raw_text: Annual Meeting of the First Mutual Transportation Assurance Company - The MTA's Captive Insurance Company will hold its statutorily required annual meeting in which it will review the prior year's operations as well as submit its financial statements and actuarial report for final approval.

payload.description: Annual Meeting of the First Mutual Transportation Assurance Company (FMTAC) - MTA's Captive Insurance Company will hold its statutorily required annual meeting to review prior year operations and submit financial statements and actuarial report for final approval.

tool_args.label: February Financial Plan
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA Office of Management & Budget will present, for information purposes, a revised Financial Plan reflecting any technical adjustments from the Adopted Budget and the incorporation of certain below-the-line policy actions into the baseline.

payload.description: February Financial Plan - MTA Office of Management & Budget will present a revised Financial Plan reflecting technical adjustments from the Adopted Budget and incorporation of below-the-line policy actions into the baseline.

tool_args.label: Mortgage Recording Tax Escalation Payments
tool_args.raw_text: Mortgage Recording Tax – Escalation Payments to Dutchess, Orange and Rockland Counties - By State statute, Dutchess, Orange and Rockland Counties are entitled to a share of MTA's MRT-1 and MRT-2 tax receipts collected in these counties during the prior year. The amount may be no less than $1.5 million for Dutchess and Orange Counties, and no less than $2.0 million for Rockland County.

payload.description: Mortgage Recording Tax - Escalation Payments to Dutchess, Orange and Rockland Counties. By State statute, these counties are entitled to a share of MTA's MRT-1 and MRT-2 tax receipts. Minimum amounts: $1.5M for Dutchess and Orange, $2.0M for Rockland.
March Action Item: All-Agency Annual Procurement Report - The Agencies and the MTA Procurement Division should be prepared to answer questions on this State-required report.
May Action Item: MTA Annual Investment Report - The MTA Treasury Division should be prepared to answer questions on this State-required report.

tool_args.label: PWEF Assessment
tool_args.raw_text: PWEF Assessment - The Board is requested to authorize remittance to the State Public Work Enforcement Fund for the current calendar year as required by State statute; State agencies and authorities are required to pay an assessment based on the value of public work construction projects to cover costs incurred in enforcing the State's prevailing wage laws.

payload.description: June Action Item: PWEF Assessment - The Board is requested to authorize remittance to the State Public Work Enforcement Fund for the current calendar year as required by State statute, based on the value of public work construction projects to cover costs of enforcing prevailing wage laws.

tool_args.label: Special Report: Finance Department Year-End Review
tool_args.raw_text: Special Report: Finance Department Year-End Review - The MTA Finance Department will present a report that summarizes financing activities for the prior year and expectations of financing activity for the current year.

payload.description: The MTA Finance Department will present a report that summarizes financing activities for the prior year and expectations of financing activity for the current year.

tool_args.label: Overview of the Annual Public Hearing on Projects Proposed for Federal Funding
tool_args.raw_text: Overview of the Annual Public Hearing on Projects Proposed for Federal Funding - Provide information on the projects presented for federal funding and the related public comments.

payload.description: Overview of the Annual Public Hearing on Projects Proposed for Federal Funding - Provide information on the projects presented for federal funding and the related public comments.

tool_args.label: Authorization to Issue MTA and TBTA Bonds
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Finance seeks Board approval to allow for the issuance of new money bonds or notes to fund existing approved bond financed capital projects under MTA and TBTA active bond resolutions; to allow for the refunding of fixed-rate bonds from time to time provided that such refundings comply with the Board approved refunding policy; to allow for the issuance of new money bonds or notes to fund working capital needs; and to allow for the reimbursement of capital expenditures at a later date from the proceeds of tax-exempt bond sales.

payload.description: MTA Finance seeks Board approval for: issuance of new money bonds/notes to fund existing approved bond financed capital projects under MTA and TBTA bond resolutions; refunding of fixed-rate bonds; issuance of new money bonds/notes for working capital needs; and reimbursement of capital expenditures from tax-exempt bond sales.

tool_args.label: Annual Report on Hedged and Unhedged Variable Rate Debt
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA Finance Department will present a report that summarizes the performance of the MTA's various variable-rate debt programs, including a discussion of the savings (compared to long-term rates) achieved through variable rate debt and a discussion on the current policy and limits on the use of variable rate debt.

payload.description: The MTA Finance Department will present a report summarizing performance of MTA's various variable-rate debt programs, including discussion of savings achieved compared to long-term rates and current policy and limits on variable rate debt use.

tool_args.label: Review and Assessment of the Finance Committee Charter
tool_args.raw_text: MTA Chief Financial Officer will present the most updated Finance Committee Charter to the Finance Committee members for them to review and assess its adequacy. The annual assessment is required under the current Committee Charter.

payload.description: MTA Chief Financial Officer will present the most updated Finance Committee Charter to the Finance Committee members for them to review and assess its adequacy. The annual assessment is required under the current Committee Charter.

tool_args.label: Recurring Finance Committee Agenda Items
tool_args.raw_text: Responsibility: Approval of Minutes Board Secretary; Financial Performance Report MTA OMB/Finance; Procurements MTA Procurement; Action Items Agency; MTA Consolidated Reports MTA OMB; Real Estate Agenda MTA Real Estate

payload.claim_text: Recurring Finance Committee agenda items include: Approval of Minutes (Board Secretary), Financial Performance Report (MTA OMB/Finance), Procurements (MTA Procurement), Action Items (Agency), MTA Consolidated Reports (MTA OMB), and Real Estate Agenda (MTA Real Estate).
payload.subject: Finance Committee recurring agenda
